set(_LOOM_AMDGPU_ISA_XML_SOURCE_DIR
  "${PROJECT_BINARY_DIR}/_deps/amdgpu_isa_xml-src"
)
loom_low_descriptor_data_archive(
  NAME
    loom_amdgpu_isa_xml
  SOURCE_DIR
    "${_LOOM_AMDGPU_ISA_XML_SOURCE_DIR}"
  URLS
    "https://gpuopen.com/download/AMD_GPU_MR_ISA_XML_2026_03_05.zip"
  SHA256
    "1f17587abc9d0d355cf6f65bdba7496838b4e8313922769199689615c434965c"
)

iree_add_all_subdirs()

  NAME
    error_defs
  GENERATOR
    iree::runtime::py::loom::gen::c_errors
  SOURCE
    "error_catalog.c"
  GENERATED_HDR_FLAGS
    "--header"
  GENERATED_HDRS
    "error_catalog.h"
  ARGS
    "--catalog-symbol=loom_amdgpu_error_catalog"
    "--fallback-catalog-symbol=loom_error_catalog_core"
    "--fallback-public-header=loom/error/error_catalog.h"
    "--no-runtime"
    "--public-header=loom/target/arch/amdgpu/error_catalog.h"
    "--shard=amdgpu"
  DEPS
    loom::src::loom::error::error_defs
)

  NAME
    amdgpu_hal_testdata
  SRCS
    "execution/testdata/b128_vector_add.loom"
    "execution/testdata/divergent_if_else_store.loom"
    "execution/testdata/divergent_lds_producer.loom"
    "execution/testdata/divergent_then_store.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot2f_bf16_buffer.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot2f_bf16_gemm4x8x4.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot2f_f16_buffer.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot2f_f16_gemm4x8x4.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot2f_f16_lds_coop_gemm4x4x8.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot2f_f16_lds_gemm4x8x4.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot2f_f16_lds_gemm4x8x8.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot4i_signed_buffer.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot4i_u8u8_buffer.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot4i_u8u8_gemm4x8x4.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot4i_u8u8_tile8x4.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot8i4_signed_buffer.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot8i4_u4u4_buffer.loom"
    "execution/testdata/dot8i4_u4u4_lds_coop_gemm4x4x32.loom"
    "execution/testdata/gfx11_d16_lds_roundtrip.loom"
    "execution/testdata/gfx11_wmma_lds_roundtrip.loom"
    "execution/testdata/gfx11_wmma_zero.loom"
    "execution/testdata/lds_b128_roundtrip.loom"
    "execution/testdata/masked_upsample6_reduce.loom"
    "execution/testdata/model_swiglu_tile4_f32.loom"
    "execution/testdata/scf_if_vector_result.loom"
    "execution/testdata/workgroup_reduce_maxnumf.loom"
    "execution/testdata/workitem_id_x_256_store.loom"
  C_FILE_OUTPUT
    "execution/amdgpu_hal_testdata.c"
  H_FILE_OUTPUT
    "execution/amdgpu_hal_testdata.h"
  IDENTIFIER
    "loom_amdgpu_amdgpu_hal_testdata"
  TESTONLY
  FLATTEN
  PUBLIC
)

loom_cc_test(
  NAME
    hal_execution_test
  SRCS
    "execution/hal_execution_test.cc"
  DEPS
    ::execution_provider
    ::amdgpu_hal_testdata
    ::low_registry
    ::amdgpu_hal_backend
    ::target_info
    ::target_record_table
    iree::base
    loom::src::loom::ops::op_registry
    loom::src::loom::tooling::compile::pipeline
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::compile_options
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::execution_provider
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::hal_candidate
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::hal_invocation
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::hal_runtime
    loom::src::loom::tooling::execution::session
    iree::testing::gtest
    iree::testing::gtest_main
  LABELS
    "driver=amdgpu"
    "nodocker"
    "requires-gpu-amd"
  GROUP
    "iree-loom-amdgpu-tests"
)

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    hal_kernel_abi
  HDRS
    "hal_binding_descriptor.h"
    "hal_kernel_abi.h"
  SRCS
    "hal_kernel_abi.c"
  DEPS
    ::error_defs
    ::target_info
    ::target_refs
    iree::base
    iree::base::internal::arena
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::allocation
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::function
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::register_class_map
    loom::src::loom::error::emitter
    loom::src::loom::ir
    loom::src::loom::ops::low
    loom::src::loom::target::types
  PUBLIC
)

)

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    wait_plan
  HDRS
    "wait_plan.h"
  SRCS
    "wait_plan.c"
  DEPS
    iree::base
    iree::base::internal::arena
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::descriptors
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::function
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::schedule
    loom::src::loom::ir
    loom::src::loom::ops::low
    loom::src::loom::util::json
    loom::src::loom::util::stream
  PUBLIC
)

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    wait_packets
  HDRS
    "wait_packets.h"
  SRCS
    "wait_packets.c"
  DEPS
    ::target_refs
    ::wait_plan
    iree::base
    iree::base::internal::arena
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::descriptors
    loom::src::loom::codegen::low::function
    loom::src::loom::ir
    loom::src::loom::ops::low
    loom::src::loom::target::arch::amdgpu::target_info
    loom::src::loom::util::json
    loom::src::loom::util::stream
  PUBLIC
)

  NAME
    occupancy_tables
  GENERATOR
    iree::runtime::py::loom::gen::amdgpu_occupancy_tables
  DEPS
    ::target_info
    iree::base
)

)

  CC_LIBRARIES
    "low_registry"
)
